00026 #ifndef _TYPES_MD_H_
00027 #define _TYPES_MD_H_
00028 
00029 #include "wrappers.h"
00030 
00031 /* use these macros when the compiler supports the long long type */
00032 
00033 #define ll_high(a)    ((long)((a)>>32))
00034 #define ll_low(a)    ((long)(a))
00035 #define int2ll(a)    ((int64_t)(a))
00036 #define ll2int(a)    ((int)(a))
00037 #define ll_add(a, b)    ((a) + (b))
00038 #define ll_and(a, b)    ((a) & (b))
00039 #define ll_div(a, b)    ((a) / (b))
00040 #define ll_mul(a, b)    ((a) * (b))
00041 #define ll_neg(a)    (-(a))
00042 #define ll_not(a)    (~(a))
00043 #define ll_or(a, b)    ((a) | (b))
00044 #define ll_shl(a, n)    ((a) << (n))
00045 #define ll_shr(a, n)    ((a) >> (n))
00046 #define ll_sub(a, b)    ((a) - (b))
00047 #define ll_ushr(a, n)    ((unsigned long long)(a) >> (n))
00048 #define ll_xor(a, b)    ((a) ^ (b))
00049 #define uint2ll(a)    ((uint64_t)(unsigned long)(a))
00050 #define ll_rem(a,b)    ((a) % (b))
00051 
00052 #define INT_OP(x,op,y)  ((x) op (y))
00053 #define NAN_CHECK(l,r,x) x
00054 #define IS_NAN(x) isnand(x)
00055 
00056 /* comparison operators */
00057 #define ll_ltz(ll)    ((ll)<0)
00058 #define ll_gez(ll)    ((ll)>=0)
00059 #define ll_eqz(a)    ((a) == 0)
00060 #define ll_eq(a, b)    ((a) == (b))
00061 #define ll_ne(a,b)    ((a) != (b))
00062 #define ll_ge(a,b)    ((a) >= (b))
00063 #define ll_le(a,b)    ((a) <= (b))
00064 #define ll_lt(a,b)    ((a) < (b))
00065 #define ll_gt(a,b)    ((a) > (b))
00066 
00067 #define ll_zero_const    ((int64_t) 0)
00068 #define ll_one_const    ((int64_t) 1)
00069 
00070 extern void ll2str(int64_t a, char *s, char *limit);
00071 
00072 #endif /* !_TYPES_MD_H_ */
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:28 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
